title: Senior Financial Analyst - L&T Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - L&T Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, L&T Finance in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About L&T Finance:
L&T Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance!
